evals.prompt: Expose our agent with a web UI — add the frontend so users can interact with it in the browser.
evals.expected_output: console import, console.NewLauncher last in launchersweb.NewLauncher; deployment args include agui, scheduler, -app_name, and console
assertions: console.NewLauncher is the last argument inside launchersweb.NewLauncher
Dockerfile CMD or Cloud Run args include agui scheduler -app_name and console
Mentions add-agui and add-scheduler as required for bundled console SPA

evals.prompt: Wire console branding with logo and favicon — assets are hosted on our CDN.
evals.expected_output: WithBranding with Logo and Favicon resolvers using URLAsset, not LogoURL/FaviconURL directly
assertions: Sets Logo and Favicon with console.URLAsset not LogoURL or FaviconURL
Explains URLAsset vs EmbedAsset vs DirAsset when asset location differs

evals.prompt: Brand the console with embedded logo and favicon files in our agent repo.
evals.expected_output: go:embed branding FS with EmbedAsset resolvers for Logo and Favicon
assertions: Uses console.EmbedAsset for Logo and/or Favicon
Does not set LogoURL or FaviconURL directly in Branding struct
